name_en: Exclusive launch model: M82717 [Premium Enhanced Version]. Genuine Italian Grade A diamond quilted leather from the official factory. Counter synchronized chip. Focus on quality, full steel hardware, fabric, craftsmanship, edge painting, Grade A high quality, fully upgraded again. Photos match the product. Includes full packaging set. Dimensions: 18*12*8CM
